mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.custom_id, t0.estimate_id, t0.estimate_money, t0.estimate_date,t0.estimate_end_date,t0.agency_fee,t0.reality_agency_fee, t0.deal_money, t0.deal_date, t0.taxation, t0.transfer_ownership_date, t0.contacts, t0.contacts_phone, t0.programme, t0.remark, t0.flow_state, t0.is_deleted
